indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: high-traffic public layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is designed for public use, not focused work, making it unsuitable for solo computer work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is highly unsuitable for solo computer work. The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and a high-traffic layout make it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The ambient lighting also fails to provide adequate task illumination for screen work.
